notes: IDs are kebab-case; safe to reuse as mesh name / React key / URL slug.
tagline = Chinese one-liner (demo audience = 中小学生 per brief).
taglineEn added as a bonus for future i18n; not required.
shared: true = organelle id reusable across eukaryotic cells (same FE mesh component can render it).
shared: false = cell-type-specific; needs its own Tripo3D asset.
Counts: 7 cells; organelles per cell = 5–6 (bacteria 5). Total organelle entries = 40.
Full cell models (7) are indexed by cell.id itself; no separate entry.

cells.tagline: 会用阳光给自己做饭的绿色工厂。
cells.taglineEn: The green factory that cooks its own food with sunlight.

organelles.tagline: 像给细胞穿了一身硬铠甲。
organelles.taglineEn: A rigid armor wrapped around the cell.

organelles.tagline: 细胞自己的太阳能板，把阳光变成糖。
organelles.taglineEn: The cell's own solar panel — turns sunlight into sugar.

organelles.tagline: 占掉大半个细胞的巨型水罐。
organelles.taglineEn: A giant water tank that fills most of the cell.

organelles.tagline: 细胞的指挥部，DNA 蓝图都在这里。
organelles.taglineEn: The command center — holds the DNA blueprint.

organelles.tagline: 把糖变成细胞能用的能量。
organelles.taglineEn: Turns sugar into usable energy.

cells.tagline: 能屈能伸的万能细胞，你身上大部分都是它。
cells.taglineEn: The shape-shifting all-rounder — most of your body is made of it.

organelles.tagline: 柔软的门卫，决定谁能进出。
organelles.taglineEn: A flexible gatekeeper — decides what goes in and out.

organelles.tagline: 细胞的指挥部，DNA 蓝图都在这里。
organelles.taglineEn: The command center — holds the DNA blueprint.

organelles.tagline: 细胞的充电宝，给所有活儿供电。
organelles.taglineEn: The cell's power bank — fuels everything.

organelles.tagline: 像工厂的流水线，批量造蛋白质。
organelles.taglineEn: Assembly lines that mass-produce proteins.

organelles.tagline: 细胞里的打包邮局，贴标签、发货。
organelles.taglineEn: The cell's mailroom — labels and ships products out.

organelles.tagline: 细胞里的垃圾处理厂，分解废料。
organelles.taglineEn: The recycling plant — breaks down waste.

cells.tagline: 身体里的超长通讯员，发电信号给大脑和肌肉。
cells.taglineEn: The super-long messenger — sends electrical signals across your body.

organelles.tagline: 神经元做决定的地方。
organelles.taglineEn: Where the neuron makes its decisions.

organelles.tagline: 像树枝一样接收信号的小天线。
organelles.taglineEn: Branch-like antennas that pick up signals.

organelles.tagline: 信号高速路，最长能跨整个身体。
organelles.taglineEn: The signal highway — can run across your whole body.

organelles.tagline: 给轴突裹上的绝缘层，让信号跑得更快。
organelles.taglineEn: Insulation around the axon — speeds up the signal.

organelles.tagline: 信号的末端小口袋，把消息投给下一个细胞。
organelles.taglineEn: The signal's end pocket — hands off the message to the next cell.

organelles.tagline: 细胞的指挥部，藏在胞体里。
organelles.taglineEn: The command center — tucked inside the soma.

cells.tagline: 身体里的巡逻保安，发现敌人就包围吞掉。
cells.taglineEn: Your body's patrol guard — surrounds and swallows invaders.

organelles.tagline: 长成几瓣的细胞核，方便挤过狭窄血管。
organelles.taglineEn: A multi-lobed nucleus — squeezes through tight blood vessels.

organelles.tagline: 能变形的软外壳，伸出爪子抓细菌。
organelles.taglineEn: A stretchy outer shell — reaches out to grab bacteria.

organelles.tagline: 消化吞进来的敌人。
organelles.taglineEn: Digests the invaders it swallows.

organelles.tagline: 给追击和吞噬提供能量。
organelles.taglineEn: Powers the chase and the swallow.

organelles.tagline: 细胞里的武器库，装着杀菌武器。
organelles.taglineEn: An internal armory of antibacterial weapons.

organelles.tagline: 伸出来抓东西的临时小脚。
organelles.taglineEn: Temporary 'fake feet' that reach out to grab things.

cells.tagline: 身体的保鲜膜，铺满皮肤、肠道、血管内壁。
cells.taglineEn: Your body's cling-wrap — lines your skin, gut, and blood vessels.

organelles.tagline: 细胞的指挥部。
organelles.taglineEn: The command center.

organelles.tagline: 分出细胞内外的一层柔软边界。
organelles.taglineEn: A soft border between inside and outside.

organelles.tagline: 表面的密集小刷子，大大扩大吸收面积。
organelles.taglineEn: A dense brush of bristles that boost absorption area.

organelles.tagline: 和邻居贴死的魔术贴，不让东西从缝里漏过。
organelles.taglineEn: Velcro to the neighbor cell — nothing leaks through the gap.

organelles.tagline: 细胞之间的铆钉，让组织扛得住拉扯。
organelles.taglineEn: Rivets between cells — lets tissue handle stretching.

organelles.tagline: 给吸收、分泌这些活儿供电。
organelles.taglineEn: Powers absorption and secretion work.

cells.tagline: 最简单的生命形式，没有真正的细胞核。
cells.taglineEn: The simplest living thing — no real nucleus, no fancy parts.

organelles.tagline: 细菌的 DNA 就散放在这里，没有外壳包着。
organelles.taglineEn: The bacterium's DNA sits loose here, no envelope.

organelles.tagline: 造蛋白质的小机器，比真核的还小一号。
organelles.taglineEn: The protein-building machine — smaller than the eukaryotic kind.

organelles.tagline: 细菌的外层硬壳，抗生素常打的靶点。
organelles.taglineEn: The bacterium's hard outer shell — a common antibiotic target.

organelles.tagline: 像小螺旋桨一样推着细菌游泳。
organelles.taglineEn: Works like a propeller — pushes the bacterium through liquid.

organelles.tagline: 粘粘的外衣，帮细菌黏住宿主、躲开免疫系统。
organelles.taglineEn: A sticky coat — helps the bacterium stick and hide from immune cells.

cells.tagline: 能收缩的长条细胞，你每一次抬手都靠它。
cells.taglineEn: The contracting cable — every time you lift your arm, this is working.

organelles.tagline: 一束束的收缩绳索，发力就靠它拉。
organelles.taglineEn: Bundles of contracting ropes — the thing that actually pulls.

organelles.tagline: 收缩的最小单元，放大看像条纹的尺子。
organelles.taglineEn: The smallest contraction unit — looks like a striped ruler up close.

organelles.tagline: 存钙离子的仓库，一放钙细胞就收缩。
organelles.taglineEn: Calcium warehouse — release the calcium and the fiber contracts.

organelles.tagline: 一根肌纤维有好多个指挥部，一起发令。
organelles.taglineEn: One fiber has many command centers, giving orders together.

organelles.tagline: 肌肉里特别密，因为发力超耗能量。
organelles.taglineEn: Packed densely in muscle — contraction burns a lot of energy.

organelles.tagline: 肌肉细胞特殊的外膜，传递收缩信号。
organelles.taglineEn: Muscle's specialized outer membrane — carries the contraction signal.
